user_research_request: Find what must be true before a Soulforge workflow may automatically hand a research delta to the Knowledge Wiki Cell.
stop_condition: If the packet would need real source truth, NotebookLM account state, owner approval, or wiki mutation, record a blocker instead of claiming completion.

synthetic_notebooklm_claims.N1: Goal must be declared before material research.
synthetic_notebooklm_claims.N2: NotebookLM and Codex research lanes must remain separated until comparison.
synthetic_notebooklm_claims.N3: Common claims should be removed from the delta view but retained as trace metadata.
synthetic_notebooklm_claims.N4: Handoff should target knowledge_wiki_cell / knowledge_wiki_pipeline_v0 after boundary pass.
synthetic_notebooklm_claims.N5: The research workflow itself may register the result in the wiki if both lanes agree.
synthetic_notebooklm_claims.N6: If a new workflow is needed, route creation through workflow-generator.

synthetic_codex_claims.C1: A goal declaration is required before material research begins.
synthetic_codex_claims.C2: The two research paths must stay independent until both packets are complete.
synthetic_codex_claims.C3: Agreement between NotebookLM and Codex is not source truth and must not imply owner approval.
synthetic_codex_claims.C4: Delta handoff may be prepared for knowledge_wiki_cell, but registration judgment belongs downstream.
synthetic_codex_claims.C5: Common claims are trace metadata and should not be repeated as delta recommendations.
synthetic_codex_claims.C6: Created or evolved workflows require workflow-check before readiness, registration, promotion, default-route switch, or default-route-safety claims.
synthetic_codex_claims.C7: Google Drive placement and NotebookLM packet-map mutation are outside this workflow.
